chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-172 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Hearing/priority 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1, 18, 22, 25 & 28 and reply as at ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1587/2025 3. For hearing of main case 15.12.2025 Petitioner Tariq Kamal is present in person *********** Petitioner, the tenant, is present in person and submits that execution filed by Respondent No.1 before the Rent Controller/Executing Court has been allowed and he has been evicted from the demised premises therefore purpose of this petition has been served. Further Suit bearing No.1928 of 2025 is also pending before the same court for specific performance of contract in which the defendant, who is respondent here, is not appearing. He further submits that he would pursue the suit pending before the trial court and seeks withdrawal of this petition. Order accordingly. Head of Const. Benches B-K Soomro
